page_metadata.biotools__summary: AlignGraph2 is a tool for genome-assisted reassembly pipeline for PacBio long reads. It extends and refines contigs assembled from the long reads with a published genome similar to the sequencing genome.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: AlignGraph2 is a tool for genome-assisted reassembly pipeline for PacBio long reads. It extends and refines contigs assembled from the long reads with a published genome similar to the sequencing genome.
